steps.label: Let's focus on Massachusetts.
steps.text: When we zoom in, the data becomes personal.

steps.label: Three paths, one conclusion.
steps.text:
The Shared Socioeconomic Pathways (SSPs) represent different climate change mitgation and adaptation scenarios. The figure shows models run to simulate three SSPs. SSP2: Medium challenges to mitigation and adaptation SSP3: High challenges to mitigation and adaptation SSP5: High challenges to mitigation, low challenges to adaptation
Regardless of the path we take, the trend is clear: Massachusetts is heading toward a wetter, more saturated future.
Hover over the projections to isolate them.
